context: Tests whether the agent applies writing-great-skills failure-mode diagnosis to improve a poorly-written SKILL.md. The fixture has embedded no-ops ('be thorough', 'make sure everything is captured'), duplication ('record decisions made' twice, 'the notes should be...' three times), missing completion criteria on key steps, and a vague description that declares no invocation type. A good improvement names and fixes each issue using writing-great-skills vocabulary.

checklist.name: No-ops removed
checklist.description: Lines that tell the model to do what it already does by default ('be thorough and accurate', 'make sure your notes are clear', 'be prepared', 'make the notes professional') are deleted — not paraphrased or softened, but gone.

checklist.name: Duplication collapsed
checklist.description: Repeated content is collapsed to a single source of truth: 'record decisions made' appearing twice is one entry; 'the notes should be shared/accurate/useful' restated three times becomes one.

checklist.name: Completion criteria added
checklist.description: At least one step that previously ended without a done-condition now ends with a checkable criterion — e.g. 'share within 24 hours: confirmed sent to all attendees' rather than just 'share with the team'.

checklist.name: Invocation type declared and description fixed
checklist.description: The improved skill explicitly declares invocation type: either disable-model-invocation: true with a concise human-facing description, OR a model-invoked description with specific trigger phrasing. The vague current description ('helps capture and organize meeting notes') is replaced.

checklist.name: Review report uses writing-great-skills vocabulary
checklist.description: review-report.md names at least two failure modes using writing-great-skills vocabulary (no-op, duplication, sediment, premature completion, sprawl, missing completion criterion) and explains how each was fixed.

checklist.name: Core purpose preserved
checklist.description: The improved skill is still about meeting notes — not rewritten for a different domain.

checklist.name: Improved skill is more legible
checklist.description: The improved SKILL.md is noticeably shorter and easier to scan than the original — removal of no-ops and duplication reduces bulk.

checklist.name: No new no-ops introduced
checklist.description: The improved version does not add new no-ops while removing old ones.
